name: paypaga-api-tests
description: Tests para endpoint oauth2 de paypaga

scripts.clean: if exist allure-results rmdir /s /q allure-results & if exist allure-report rmdir /s /q allure-report
scripts.test: npm run clean & cross-env TEST_ENV=dev jest & allure generate ./allure-results --clean -o ./allure-report & node ./utils/applyDarkMode.js & npx http-server ./allure-report -p 5050 -o
scripts.test:dev: npm run clean & cross-env TEST_ENV=dev jest & allure generate ./allure-results --clean -o ./allure-report & node ./utils/applyDarkMode.js & npx http-server ./allure-report -p 5050 -o
scripts.test:stg: npm run clean & cross-env TEST_ENV=stg jest & allure generate ./allure-results --clean -o ./allure-report & node ./utils/applyDarkMode.js & npx http-server ./allure-report -p 5050 -o
scripts.test:payurl:stg: npm run clean & cross-env TEST_ENV=stg jest payurl & allure generate ./allure-results --clean -o ./allure-report & node ./utils/applyDarkMode.js & npx http-server ./allure-report -p 5050 -o
scripts.test:h2h:stg: npm run clean & cross-env TEST_ENV=stg jest payinH2H & allure generate ./allure-results --clean -o ./allure-report & node ./utils/applyDarkMode.js & npx http-server ./allure-report -p 5050 -o
scripts.test:e2e:stg: npm run clean & cross-env TEST_ENV=stg jest interactivity & allure generate ./allure-results --clean -o ./allure-report & node ./utils/applyDarkMode.js & npx http-server ./allure-report -p 5050 -o
scripts.test:ec:stg: npm run clean & cross-env TEST_ENV=stg jest EC & allure generate ./allure-results --clean -o ./allure-report & node ./utils/applyDarkMode.js & npx http-server ./allure-report -p 5050 -o
scripts.test:ec:dev: npm run clean & cross-env TEST_ENV=dev jest EC & allure generate ./allure-results --clean -o ./allure-report & node ./utils/applyDarkMode.js & npx http-server ./allure-report -p 5050 -o
scripts.test:pl:flow: npm run clean & cross-env TEST_ENV=dev jest paymentlink_merchant_EC.flow & allure generate ./allure-results --clean -o ./allure-report & node ./utils/applyDarkMode.js & npx http-server ./allure-report -p 5050 -c-1 -o
scripts.test:pl:ui: npm run clean & cross-env TEST_ENV=dev jest paymentlink_merchant_EC_interactivity & allure generate ./allure-results --clean -o ./allure-report & node ./utils/applyDarkMode.js & npx http-server ./allure-report -p 5050 -c-1 -o
